text:
Once upon a time in sleepy Oakdale. Oliver loved owls. He knew all their owl noises.

One night Oliver saw a great owl outside.

"I think I saw you." Oliver whispered.

The owl hooted back.

"I'll name you Snowy." Oliver smiled.

Every day Oliver spoke owl words with Snowy.

In the forest. One day.

"Why do owls hoot?" Oliver wondered.

"They sing." Owls knew.

In a tree.

"I think I know." Oliver thought.

He hooted softly.

Snowy hooted again.

Oliver learned.

Just owls.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
